soap:
RE-REVIEW · lancedb/lancedb#2345 — chore: bump Python 3.12 to 3.13 in actions
reviewed 7ea333f8 → aac34e66  (42 commits on branch, 7 of the PR's own files; 57 base-merge files excluded as off-branch churn)
domain: .github/workflows (CI)

=== S (Subjective) ===
Author intent: a CI chore — move the Python matrix/pin from 3.12 to 3.13 across
the GitHub Actions workflows and composite actions, declare 3.13 support in
pyproject classifiers + pyright pythonVersion, and clean up the now-unused
`python-minor-version` composite-action input. Since my last review the branch
took 42 commits, most of which are base-branch merges (57 files excluded as
off-branch). The PR's own delta is small and confined to CI config + pyproject.

=== O (Objective) ===
Ground truth = the commit-anchored delta 7ea333f8...aac34e66, scoped to the PR's
own 7 changed files, plus file reads at head.

Changed (own work):
- .github/workflows/build_linux_wheel/action.yml  — remove python-minor-version input
- .github/workflows/build_mac_wheel/action.yml     — remove python-minor-version input
- .github/workflows/build_windows_wheel/action.yml — remove python-minor-version input
- .github/workflows/run_tests/action.yml           — remove input; pip upgrade + PYO3_USE_ABI3_FORWARD_COMPATIBILITY=1
- .github/workflows/pypi-publish.yml               — setup-python 3.8→3.9 (linux), 3.12→3.13 (mac/win)
- .github/workflows/python.yml                     — 3.12→3.13 pins; matrix ["9","12"]→["9","13"]; --prefer-binary --only-binary pandas; uninstall pandas in no-pylance test
- python/pyproject.toml                            — add 3.13 classifier; add colpali-engine>=0.3.10 to embeddings; pythonVersion 3.12→3.13

Verified at head (aac34e66):
- build_mac_wheel/action.yml and build_windows_wheel/action.yml inputs: block no
  longer declares python-minor-version (confirmed by file read).
- pypi-publish.yml STILL passes `python-minor-version: 8` at lines 80 (mac) and
  101 (windows) — to actions that no longer accept it (confirmed).
- python.yml run_tests call sites (lines 138/176/206) correctly pass NO
  python-minor-version — the cleanup WAS applied here. So the input removal is
  inconsistent: run_tests call sites fixed, pypi-publish mac/win call sites missed.

=== A (Assessment) ===

CONDITIONS LEDGER (0/0 met)
  (no prior issue(blocking) conditions reconstructed from posted comments —
   nothing to verify. Conspicuous but correct: this PR carried no blocking
   ledger into the re-review.)

FRESH-EYES DELTA (findings in code changed since last review)

  1. issue: orphaned `python-minor-version: 8` passed to mac/windows build
     actions whose input was removed in this same PR.
     → pypi-publish.yml:80 and :101 still pass `python-minor-version: 8`, but
       build_mac_wheel/action.yml and build_windows_wheel/action.yml no longer
       declare that input (this PR removed it). The run_tests call sites in
       python.yml were cleaned up; these two were missed. Composite actions
       don't hard-fail on extra `with:` keys, so CI won't break — but it's stale,
       misleading config and the literal `8` is now meaningless. Drop both lines.
     blocking: no (dead config, not a build breaker)

  2. note: scope creep — `colpali-engine>=0.3.10` added to the `embeddings`
     extra in pyproject.toml. Unrelated to a "bump 3.12→3.13" chore; it adds a
     new dependency and a new lower-bound constraint to the solver. Either split
     it out or call it out in the PR description so it isn't silently shipped
     under a CI-chore title.
     blocking: no

  3. note: 3.13-compat workarounds look intentional and reasonable, but worth a
     one-line rationale in the PR body so they aren't mistaken for accidents:
     `--prefer-binary --only-binary "pandas"` (avoid building pandas from sdist
     on 3.13), `pip uninstall -y pylance pandas` + renamed "without pylance or
     pandas" test, and `PYO3_USE_ABI3_FORWARD_COMPATIBILITY=1` in run_tests
     (lets an abi3 wheel built against an older Python load under 3.13).
     blocking: no

  4. observation (non-issue): pypi-publish linux setup-python bumped 3.8→3.9, not
     to 3.13. Consistent with build_linux_wheel using maturin/manylinux for the
     actual build; the host Python only drives maturin. Fine.

No new correctness regressions found in the delta.

=== P (Plan) ===
RECOMMENDATION: comment (approve-with-nits) — no blocking conditions, no build
breaker. One real cleanup (finding #1: drop the two orphaned `python-minor-version: 8`
lines) plus two PR-hygiene notes (#2 scope creep, #3 document the 3.13 workarounds).

confidence: high on the orphaned-input finding (verified input removal + live
call sites at head) and on the empty ledger. Medium on whether colpali-engine is
truly out of scope vs. a deliberate piggyback the author intends.

what would make this wrong: if GitHub Actions were configured to error on unknown
composite-action inputs (it is not, by default), finding #1 would escalate to
blocking; if the author's PR description already explains colpali-engine and the
pandas workarounds, notes #2/#3 are moot.
